args.query:
SELECT ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT theme, COUNT(*) as mentions,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ep.sentiment = 'positive' THEN 1 WHEN ep.sentiment = 'negative' THEN -1 ELSE 0 END), 2) as avg_sentiment_score
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep, UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY theme ORDER BY mentions DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT p.platform, ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as post_count
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY p.platform, ep.sentiment ORDER BY p.platform, post_count DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.platform, p.channel_handle, p.title, pe.likes, pe.views, ep.sentiment, ep.ai_summary
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
LEFT JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.post_engagements` pe ON p.post_id = pe.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.post_id ORDER BY pe.fetched_at DESC) = 1
ORDER BY (COALESCE(pe.likes,0) + COALESCE(pe.views,0)) DESC LIMIT 10

WITH latest_engagements AS (
    SELECT post_id, likes, views, shares, comments_count, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY post_id ORDER BY fetched_at DESC) as _rn
    FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.post_engagements`
),
period_metrics AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-13' AND '2026-04-20' THEN 'Baseline'
            WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-05-01' THEN 'Current'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END as period,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.post_id) as posts,
        SUM(le.views) as views,
        SUM(le.likes) as likes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ep.sentiment = 'positive' THEN p.post_id END) as positive_posts,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ep.sentiment = 'negative' THEN p.post_id END) as negative_posts
    FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
    JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
    LEFT JOIN latest_engagements le ON p.post_id = le.post_id AND le._rn = 1
    WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
      AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT 
    period,
    posts,
    views,
    likes,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(positive_posts, posts) as pos_pct,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(negative_posts, posts) as neg_pct
FROM period_metrics
WHERE period IN ('Baseline', 'Current')

WITH theme_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-13' AND '2026-04-20' THEN 'Baseline'
            WHEN DATE(p.posted_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-05-01' THEN 'Current'
        END as period,
        theme,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.post_id) as posts
    FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
    JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
    UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
    WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
      AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT 
    theme,
    MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'Baseline' THEN posts ELSE 0 END) as baseline_posts,
    MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'Current' THEN posts ELSE 0 END) as current_posts,
    (MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'Current' THEN posts ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'Baseline' THEN posts ELSE 0 END)) as delta
FROM theme_stats
WHERE theme IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY ABS(delta) DESC
LIMIT 10
